name: Donna
testimonial: Thanks Zac for the great work! Well priced, turned up on time, excellent customer service. We will definitely use this business again. Removed 2x aircon units from walls and reinstalled after Reno work.

name: Marilyn S
testimonial: Yes. He was respectful, listened and did the job well.

name: Ian P
testimonial: Zac was fantastic, he arrived on time to inspect our ducted aircon and his price was competitve. Given the age of our unit (17 years) the suspected faulty part is no longer available so we are now looking at getting a whole new unit installed. Zac did a thorough inspection on a return visit of our existing setup and gave us the most cost effective option for our situation. Highly recommended.

name: Dishant M
testimonial: Zac was awesome and very prompt

name: Maria H
testimonial: Absolutely. Zak turned up on time, and was very thorough in his work.

name: Neil G
testimonial: Zac was very prompt with communication leading up to the scheduled time. After arriving, he explained clearly what the plan was, and completed the job sooner than expected! Quality of work was top notch, already looking into booking again for another job in the near future. Thanks Zac. Update 16-October-2023: Called out Zac again for another AC installation in another room of ours, handled supply and installation. There was a small mishap during installation, to which Zac responded to ASAP. Genuine service, and would honestly highly recommend to anyone. Thanks again Zac.

name: Amy
testimonial: Absolutely amazing service, could not recommend more. 10/10

name: Jennifer R
testimonial: Highly recommend-great communication, punctual, thorough job & competitive rates. Will hire again!

name: Rachel O
testimonial: Zac was quick to respond to the ad, available the next day and completed the job quickly and very pleased with the work done

name: Rose H
testimonial: Zac was awesome. His contact was excellent and management of time faultless. He done a great job, that was professional, trustworthy, knowledgeable, safe and friendly. A great job for affordable price. We intend on hiring Zac again to install another aircon unit. Highly recommended. Thanks Zac, even my granddaughter thought you rocked. :)

name: Raymond
testimonial: Excellent Service and Installation professional completed
